Title: Rooster Statue Graphic Black and Grey T-Shirt
Description:
Show off your appreciation for strong design with this striking graphic t-shirt. Featuring an intricate black and grey illustration of a rooster perched on a detailed, column-like pedestal, this design adds a touch of bold artistry to your wardrobe.

This unique print captures the fierce spirit and magnificent detail of the rooster, framed by stylized lettering and elements, giving it a classic, tattoo-inspired feel.

  • Perfect For: Art enthusiasts, those who love vintage or gothic styles, or anyone looking for a statement piece.
  • Material Feel: Printed on a high-quality, comfortable cotton blend, ensuring breathability and lasting wear.
  • Great Gift: Makes a unique and thoughtful gift for friends or family who appreciate detailed illustration and bold graphic tees.

Whether worn for casual outings, concerts, or just to showcase your unique style, this tee is an excellent conversation starter.
